description_long: This is a wooden folding chair with a traditional Asian design, featuring a high backrest and a decorative cut-out pattern in the upper back panel. The chair is constructed from cylindrical wooden rods, with the legs and supports forming an X-shaped cross-bracing for stability. The seat appears to be a flat wooden surface, supported by the intersecting frame below. The armrests are simple and straight, extending horizontally from the backrest supports. The wood has a warm, natural finish, and the overall structure is lightweight yet sturdy, suitable for temporary or portable seating. The open framework and lack of upholstery give it a minimalist, utilitarian appearance.
description: A traditional wooden folding chair with a high backrest, decorative cut-out, and X-shaped cross-bracing, finished in a warm natural wood tone.
description_view_0: Front view showing the high backrest with a decorative cut-out and the symmetrical X-shaped leg bracing.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile, straight armrest, and the depth of the seat and backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backrest structure, cross-bracing, and the open framework of the chair.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same thin profile and structural details as the other side.
